canvas.reset:
Adreithio'r rhaglen:
• maint a safle'r ffenestr
• modd tywyll → golau
• maint lluniau bach → arferol
• bar ochr → gweladwy / 220 px
• iaith → canfod awtomatig
• maint ffont → rhagosodiad

empty_cbz.title: Târ lhain
empty_cbz.message: I târ CBZ ú-gerir bâr eneth.

empty_cbr.title: Târ lhain
empty_cbr.message: I târ CBR ú-gerir bâr eneth.

multi_selection_crop.title: Thelegol erui
multi_selection_crop.message:
Úchebin orchad ach er randir sui lû.
Anno, eglerio er randir.

drag_drop_disabled_in_subdirectory.title: Orthor ú-erib
drag_drop_disabled_in_subdirectory.message:
I drego o dhelleir ú-erib mi and-gorvaraid.
Anno, pelthaelio i gorvaraid pedo drevedio na i rhaud.

no_selection_convert.title: Ú-thelegol
no_selection_convert.message: Anno, eglerio minaer er randir na edregol.

multi_selection_split.title: Thelegol erui
multi_selection_split.message:
Úchebin dagro ach er randir sui lû.
Anno, eglerio er randir.

invalid_number_split.title: Neder ú-orchal
invalid_number_split.message: I neder o dhelleir bui na vi ned a pae.

insufficient_selection_join.title: Thelegol ú-lîn
insufficient_selection_join.message: Anno, eglerio minaer ned rendir na antha.

pil_not_available.title: PIL ú-erib
pil_not_available.message: I gân PIL ú-erib na bado o thirendor i lhaw.

format_not_supported.title: Thîr ú-orthol
format_not_supported.message:
Thîr randir ú-orthol pedo bâr orthel.
Thîr orthol: JPG, PNG, WEBP, BMP, TIFF, GIF, ICO

no_crop_selection.title: Ú-thelegol
no_crop_selection.message: Anno, tirio sell o orchad sui ben.

corrupted_images.title: Rendir orthel
corrupted_images.hint:
They are displayed with a special icon.
Right-click a corrupted image to replace or delete it.

save_cancelled.title: Gared awartha
save_cancelled.message: Anno, orthad i anuin o veirain lhaw sui ben na garo.

empty_pdf.title: PDF lhain
empty_pdf.message: I bâr PDF ú-gerir tell eneth.

no_selection_save.title: Edregol
no_selection_save.message: Anno, eglerio minaer er tell na garo.

drag_disabled_subdirectory.title: Drego awartha
drag_disabled_subdirectory.message:
I drego o dhelleir nu tírad-pado erib sui na rhaud i gonedir.

Na drego telleir:
1. Drevedio na i rhaud nu ganad ben i ranc o remiad
2. Pedo pelthaedio i gonedir na deleb i and-gorvaraid

no_images_for_gif.title: Ú aglareb
no_images_for_gif.message: Minui aglor unad ú orthir caun conui aglor.

no_valid_images.title: Ú bain aglareb
no_valid_images.message: Ú bain aglareb círar caun conui aglor.

animated_gif_in_comic.title: GIF rîw govannen
animated_gif_in_comic.message:
Govannad: Si parth thalion gorth erin GIF covael min pent edro.

In thîl-thalion (CDisplayEx, YACReader, a yn.) penno ren in cân genediad GIF ilya ah phâr athra.

Na thired in GIF covael vain, raid chen orthad egor erin parth an i nauca "Orthad in thîl ennorath" egor "Na-dhelia GIF covael".

Man merin orthad in parth athra hon?

no_selection_adjust.title: Ú aes
no_selection_adjust.message: Edhelo min benn aphado i aðagobith.

renumber_disabled_in_subdirectory.title: Cant nâ veth ervyn
renumber_disabled_in_subdirectory.message:
Nothrim echannen nâ derthad an i erain u-alaglenner.
Alaglia i erain vi ndorthrog echannen.

zip_invalid.title: Aew ZIP
zip_invalid.message: '{file}': I bâr ú în târ ZIP orchal pedo in orthel.

rar_invalid.title: Aew RAR
rar_invalid.message: '{file}': I bâr ú în târ RAR orchal pedo in orthel.

cbr_unexpected.title: Aew
cbr_unexpected.message: Aew ú-berthad sui edro i CBR: {error}

print_not_available.title: Teitho ú-erib
print_not_available.message:
I gân win32print ú-orthanna.
Orthanno hen nu: pip install pywin32

pymupdf_not_installed.title: PyMuPDF ú-orthanna
pymupdf_not_installed.message:
I parmagol PyMuPDF (fitz) ú-orthanna.
Orthanno hen nu: pip install PyMuPDF

duplicate_names.title: Anuin o veirain edeb
duplicate_names.footer:
I·ZIP-paer ú-ceniath enith govannen.
Á enethio i vîr sain anauth.

pdf_password_required.title: PDF auth gwend
pdf_password_required.message:
I PDF prenn hen gwannant ah auth gwend.
Chen lerthad pen gwend.

file_too_large.title: I fair naur din
file_too_large.message: I fair {filename} ná {size} ar ú-boe i nauth (500 MB) i thîr.

7z_invalid.title: Raxë 7Z
7z_invalid.message: I quetta '{file}' ná úvana 7Z-mahtar eä raxë.

unsupported_files.title: Naur i-'wannathon
unsupported_files.message:
I naur i-'wannathon hin ú-'wannar, a boe i-'wannathon:

{files}

cbt_invalid.message: I pheth '{file}' u dhîn TAR i vaer nâ.

gif_created.title: Aglor coniu cennen lân
gif_created.message: I conui aglor '{name}' cennen a dorthannen na-aearon.

pywin32_required.title: Orthor ú-erib
pywin32_required.message:
I gân pywin32 bui na bado o thirendor i lhaw.
Orthanno hen nu: pip install pywin32

archive_copied.title: Târ honnen
archive_copied.message: I parth i orchal penir na i glaur.

function_not_available.title: Orthor ú-erib
function_not_available.message: Hen orthor ú-erib na lû hen.

duplicate_detected.title: Edeb hannant

history_cleared.title: Gerth mistra
history_cleared.message: I list o veirain nui mistranna.

files_copied_clipboard.title: Beirain honnen na thirendor

✓ {count} {word} honnen na thirendor

Nenin pado síi vae reviad:

  • Pedo Ctrl+V

delete_source_files.message:
Reviad na deleb i rendir nedin annedil?

Aen = Deleb i beirain edhellen
Ú = Gwara i beirain edhellen
Haedh = Haedh i orthor

Ceri i enyd a reviant?
(I thîw dhaer cerithir '_' dân)

close_without_save.title: Nornath ned egor?
close_without_save.message: Rendir nestannen. Reviad na caro târ CBZ sui ben na tegi?

conversion_complete.title: Tangwa govannen

Tangwa govannen!

extension_mismatch_generic.message: Cened 'lass dithen vorn: i pheth '{filename}' {real} bâd, {declared} ú-bâd. Enethol?
extension_mismatch_generic.title: Incorrect extension

labels.loading_lazy:
Daro, a dhartho...
{percent}%

Am merethen i geil hen ({size} MB), i bair a dharthir ned i ned. I bair e nathar an delw a dharthir thand, i bair erein a dharthir dad ned gân rhollad.
labels.apply_save_cbz:
Hertha i gohelaith
a garo i bâr CBZ
labels.apply_create_cbz:
Hertha i gohelaith
a caro bâr CBZ
labels.warning_close: Edregol! I gohelaith ú-garen a gostant!
labels.folder_up_tooltip:
Edeb-ganad na remiad
er andeb mi thirgalas
labels.license_text:
Copyright © 2025-2026 Bruno Aublet

Teitho i GNU Coleg Rhydd v3

RHYDDID A RODDIR
Gallwch ddefnyddio, copïo, newid a dosbarthu
MosaicView, hyd yn oed at ddibenion masnachol.

RHWYMEDIGAETHAU
Rhaid i bob dosbarthiad (gwreiddiol neu newidiedig) :
– gadw trwydded GPL v3
– cynnwys y cod ffynhonnell neu nodi ble i'w gael
– peidio â gosod cyfyngiadau ychwanegol

GWARANTAU
Dosberthir y meddalwedd hwn HEB UNRHYW WARANT.
Ni ellir dal ei awdur yn gyfrifol am ddifrod sy'n deillio o'i ddefnydd.

Dylech fod wedi derbyn copi o'r GNU Coleg Rhydd gyda'r rhaglen hon. Os na, gweler <https://www.gnu.org/licenses/>.
labels.license_unrar_text:
I phith CBZ erin ennas ZIP, ennas bain a galadh. I phith CBR, bo dann, erin ennas RAR, ennas herdir.

MosaicView gell egored phith CBR trwy UnRAR, offeryn gwnaed gan RARlab a ellir ei rannu.

Gwefan swyddogol: <https://www.rarlab.com/rar_add.htm>
labels.empty_canvas_line1: Tiro nin er min CBZ/CBR/CB7/CBT/PDF parf ed i nedh nyn
labels.empty_canvas_line2: Pan parf panthir, gerin dago panna edhil
labels.empty_canvas_line3: Gollyngwch un rest neu fwy i gychwyn gwaith dosrannu
labels.view_full_gpl_license: Gweled i gwedheid GNU GPL v3 sui
labels.license_7zip_text:
CB7 pedir norn sî 7z pathor, i Igor Pavlov cenn ah i GNU LGPL tolgnassen apantaina.

MosaicView pol CB7 pedir panna 7-Zip thandanen — lá cant ah apant-thanda.

Oficial bar : <https://www.7-zip.org/>
labels.icon_toolbar_show_thumb_slider: Danno i glamhoth in dath i tithenin

convert.title: Edregol {count} {word}
convert.quality_note: (Hen gân ú-hertha ach i thîr JPG a WEBP)

split.title: Dagro i tell
split.warning:
⚠ I dagol nedin nordad thennannas,
orthor lhaw eneth meria vi ben.

join.window_title: Antha i telleir - Adnestegi i râd
join.instructions:
Nestegi i rendir:
• Ortha (and/bed) na annediad orthi
• Forn (hair/formen) na annediad forn
join.size_adjustment_warning:
⚠️ In giliath daw genediad ú-gwannen.
Tiro pent daw adregir i anadad.
In tir garn daw gerir ennas.

pdf.dpi_original_tooltip:
Hantalë mîr PDF pano:
• Mellyn-thenol panë: magol DPI nestadol
• Têw-thenol panë: nelchaenen DPI
• Anír panë (têw a mellyn): mellyn DPI aníron nelchaenen 'wain, avo nelchaenen DPI
Athal: arta-nen-arta padog DPI estolad dîr anno

reduce_size.title: Revisto lend {count} {word}
reduce_size.different_dimensions_warning: In thel pannar haryar tíred tyë. Hannad tíred ortaryar ilyar pannar as í meril tír. Cenë istal tanë istanyë i tentaner antë cendëa.
reduce_size.page_width_info: I pand hatal velui in 1024, 1280, 1600, 1920 a 2000 mirian, an gwanath uir maer athra.
reduce_size.multi_page_width: Thir a thol cast annon in bair (pant/and)
reduce_size.multi_page_width_tooltip: Ista na thir annon in bair: tad annon, neled annon ah in. I methlas arnad in dad od na cast annon nehten, ped pant (annon nef a nef) po and (annon pant ar pant)

duplicate_filenames.title: ⚠️ Estel nestadren i hain
duplicate_filenames.message:
Estel i nestadren hain gwennin. Númen na estar aen alpharen
na gwaith, i alpharen na estar aen alpharen carad sui
mellon (alpharen sui núm, sui estar na).

Na estar aen alpharen sui estar na gwaith.

adjustments.title: Aðagobith i {count} {word}
adjustments.compression_info: I press peda i YÚYO a WEBE baradrim ben
adjustments.preview_warning: I prestannen dar peded ned i daer ben
adjustments.transparency_info: Gweledigrwydd a bell yn unig i lunniau PNG, WebP a ICO
adjustments.transparency_click_instruction: Brono i liw a vennir gweledigrwydd
adjustments.transparency_type_flood_tooltip: Flood fill : gweledigrwydd i canthan liw unig a amgylcha i pixsel a bronwyd
adjustments.transparency_type_global_tooltip: Gweledigrwydd govad : a bell ar holl bixeli i lun a liw agos ir pixsel a bronwyd
adjustments.transparency_skipped_warning: {count} lith(lin) ortheri — i-format ui veleth vâr. An boe chebin, esta deri nan PNG.
adjustments.auto_levels_tooltip:
Prestannen cada lîw ar govorer yn otomatig lefelau du a gwyn i fwyafu cyferbyniad.
I ddewis tudalen wrth dudalen, defnyddiwch y gwyliedydd.

levels_viewer.title: Adleg levain ah ithes
levels_viewer.black_pipette_tooltip: Pedo i pixel min bí baw morn gwathra. Aníro: sui ú-vant achaded!
levels_viewer.white_pipette_tooltip: Pedo i pixel min bí baw ninn gwathra. Aníro: sui ú-vant achaded!

outliers.title: Tîr chen edregyrn annui
outliers.message: I thîr dhenin nedreig edregyrn e 'waena harthad reviar. Dorho coita conitha i nadh:

first_page_multi.title: I benn vedui ellint
first_page_multi.message: I benn vedui i-anira ellint. Manen cerithanc notiel?
first_page_multi.option_joint_desc: Echad i velui a i chaudh benn i galad.
first_page_multi.option_exclude_desc: I benn tol anann esse ah echad vedui. Le cerithanc essa nen cenima.

an nin tiria lúmenn' (Ú-NORTHA)

batch_img.mode_all_in_one: Govaded pân lith i nîn CBZ
batch_img.mode_all_in_one_sub: (Pân lith i dir govadear i nîn CBZ)

batch_drop.intro_single: 1 rest a adawyd. Pa waith a fynnwch ei gymhwyso?
batch_drop.intro_multiple: {count} o restrau a adawyd. Pa waith a fynnwch ei gymhwyso?
batch_drop.recursive_note: Bydd is-restrau hefyd yn cael eu sganio.
batch_drop.mixed_drop_message: Gollyngoch ffeiliau a restrau ar yr un pryd. Gollyngwch ffeiliau yn unig neu restrau yn unig.

pdf_unlock.title: PDF nauthol na thírad
pdf_unlock.message:
I lef pennath thent.

I PDF prenn hen nauthol na thírad (auth herdir).

Cael prestant i PDF prenn hen pen nauthol hen?

batch_pdf_unlock.title: Penfyr PDF dorthol i-thîr
batch_pdf_unlock.message_single:
Govannen penfyr PDF 1 dorthol i-thîr. Cuiannen di CBZ nui.

I veleth lín baded penfyr vin i-dîr vaer?
batch_pdf_unlock.message_plural:
Govanner penfyr PDF {count} dorthol i-thîr. Cuiannen di CBZ nui.

I veleth lín baded penfyr o ail vin i-dîr vaer?

ico_creator.title: Bâd .ico rem
ico_creator.info_message:
I lunt boe adel galadh (16, 32, 48, 64, 128, 256 px).
I rem erin si: {w} × {h} px
ico_creator.save_blocked_message:
I rambë na .ico parfs i ú-comi lunts nar. I halad ú-pol apa i parfs nar i mosiek.
Pan pol halad, togo tai i mosiekello (Del) apa dago (Ctrl+X) pan halad an allen.

video_save_blocked.title: Ú-boe i govan
video_save_blocked.message:
I parf sí heb aen ned in vi tirith. I govan prestannen an sí tirith nain i mosaic.
An díheno i govan, echado hain o i mosaic (Del) egor critha (Ctrl+X) an lepho ammen.

straighten_viewer.title: Trenarn
straighten_viewer.instruction: Tolo trenarn vi i phith i pedim ortheri (egor pendrad) in tâl

clone_zone_viewer.title: Glawar i·dôl
clone_zone_viewer.instruction: Ctrl+tach : gwesto i·chîr  •  Tach hair : gwanna i·dôl glawariel

text_viewer.title: Pedo Parth
text_viewer.instruction: Tiro na thar i parth  •  Ctrl+hair: muda parth pixel an pixel

an lá senna i rúcin (LAUMË NÓTA)
batch_cbt.complete_message_errors: {count} CBT faif cantanë {total} of i randir :

tooltip.cbr_info:
CBR fîchiérs bûkent RAR-formât, dât propriétêr én patentéart is;
sij konnen nét bewurkje wurde, wizigings wurde bewarre yn in nij CBZ-fyl.
tooltip.batch_pdf_to_cbz:
Prestanna na CBZ phin PDF ned i said ah
i iau-said din. I lim tirith ar gwaith
sui cerir, u-prestannen athan.
tooltip.batch_pdf_permanent_delete:
TIRO: qui i gwest si togol ná nestannen,
i parth PDF edain erthennir
ve-uir sui i ahyanieth, ú-gwestol
en-edlennol. Tiro han i sí harnannen
le cópia arwa qui maer.
tooltip.batch_cbr_to_cbz:
Drega na CBZ i-neder CBR teith
vi i-thamas a i-hammad din.
tooltip.batch_cbr_permanent_delete:
TIRO: qui i daw si togol,
i CBR teith gwaith nauvar
ein-vannad ned i dregiad, ulo estel
edregiad. No tiriel i hár
nolwe-teith qui maer.
tooltip.renumber_btn_1:
Gweth auto-hired linnas periannath
Dago daerageb nan gweth dangwethad
tooltip.renumber_btn_2:
Gweth said nodia
Dago daerageb nan gweth dangwethad
tooltip.batch_img_to_cbz:
Govad ilye galadremmin hirner i mbaresse
ar i mbyrno CBZ-enna,
caro er CBZ tengwë er galadremminenna.
tooltip.batch_img_permanent_delete:
DÍR : ce sina aphadron narcha,
i galadremmin iaur dílear
húmë govad an nin politha
tangar. Tiro ma garo entulusse
ce maure.
tooltip.too_large_header: I lant in brîn an i theled
tooltip.batch_cb7_to_cbz:
Cant ilyë CB7 faif i randir
ar nu-randirissen na CBZ.
tooltip.batch_cb7_permanent_delete:
VÁQUETË : cé sina tant' is i CB7 faif

help.title: MosaicView - Bâd thuriol
help.intro: MosaicView ertha achen na orthad a gohedo gonedir (gondirin golwen) ú-bui na esgeli hain o theirair. I harfuil orthal i thîr CBZ (ZIP), CBR (RAR) a PDF. I thangail nâ celeg na i chin 64 bit er-orath.
help.open_files_content:
• Tolo i daur 'Eglo pheth' egor trasto pheth bar i fennas
• Thîr orthol: CBZ, CBR, CB7, CBT, PDF, rendir (JPG, PNG, WEBP, BMP, TIFF, GIF, ICO). EPUB fajli a chui onodded hefyd, ond dim ond eu delweddau a gaiff eu hechdynnu (anwybyddir y testun).
• PDF naitaina (auth gwend nauthol i agor): ú-'wann i prenn, raeg quetina.
• PDF nauthol na thírad (owner password): i lef lanthannen thent. MosaicView prestanta i PDF prenn dúlennol i dôl ben. Nod: i pent erui cuinar coll (WEBP, TIFF, GIF, ICO…) prestannen i formath ned-govannen or CBZ/CBR vorn. Nan i phain sain berian e-MosaicView.
help.mosaic_content:
I mosaig gweda hain parth o aen bereth vi thiliol. Ci chem:
• Athra i parth trî thelia a degir (partha-rem ben automagol, a aphada i cuia enedh-rem maenas)
• Ethro mî parth (Ctrl+pitha or Shift+pitha)
• Adloda thilia-sad am i calbar
• Ailoda eneth i feil trî pitha ha eneth
• Thelia a degir bereth-feil (CBZ/CBR/PDF) hen Windows Explorer thennas o aen bereth egor ned hadra ha gost
help.manipulation_content:
• Llusgwch a gollyngwch dudalennau i'w haildrefnu
• Llusgwch gyfanwaith i mewn i un arall i'w cyfuno
• Cliciwch yn dde ar dudalen i gael mynediad at opsiynau (cylchdroi, dileu, ayyb)
• Cliciwch ddwywaith ar dudalen i agor y gwyliedydd
• Allforiwch dudalennau unigol drwy eu llusgo i ffolder Windows, neu drwy Ctrl+C / Ctrl+V
help.renumber_content:
MosaicView anna tad tieren o edinor nothed o peith, thand ter i canod edinor nothed, i thafn menu (dui dagor dhorn) egor autorob vi radag a leithad:

• Autorob hirion illion peith tier (gwest tier): i gladhog cennod i land o ilya peth vi hirion edaid, neled peith a sui. Illion peith nai edinor nothed dan amba (thathren: edaid peth nui estannen 003-004, neled 005-006-007). Athan canad peith, er i main a i meth nosse nai dannen (thathren: 010---025).

• Sind nothed tier: ilya peth garo er erinqua nosse (001, 002, 003...), la tirien i land o peith.

Vi edinor illion tier imbi, dui dagor dhorn i canod edinor nothed. Er galad tana i cuina tier. I cirinqua tier na ten autorob edinor nothed vi radag a leithad.
help.flatten_content: Pe i târ gerir and-gorvaraid, breitho 'Pelthaedi i gorvaraid' na brestegi nel i rendir na i andeb er.
help.viewer_content:
Edeb-gano ben tell na edro i harthad:
• Tungil ← →: tírad immi telleir
• Tungol D: misto immi ner bâd rlinn
  - Tell er: er tell sui lû
  - Telleir edeb: tell er erui, sui ben 2-3, 4-5, etc.
  - Telleir edeb tadol: tell er erui, sui ben 2-3, 3-4, 4-5, etc.
• Rodel i lhaw: tírad lim
• Ctrl+Rodel pedo Ctrl+Mas/Lim: megil
• Ctrl+0: adnortho i megil
• Tungol F11: lain pen
• Edeb-ganad: misto lain pen
• Tungol Échap: awartha i thammas / avego i harthad
help.join_pages_content: Ethro mî parth consecutive, haer-pitha → 'parth egor onta' parth horizontal or vertical onta. I naith en i chammad gwannen tholed na naith en i phyrth thui, anim PNG and thenid.
help.split_pages_content:
Na dagro thennas telleir edeb:
• Eglerio i telleir na dhagro
• Ganad formen → 'Dagro i telleir thelegin'
• Eglerio i rhaw (orthi pedo forn)
help.crop_content:
Mi harthad, tiro sell ben i randir na meril dôl orchad:
• Tiro i sell nu lhaw
• Admerio hen nu tírad ben i remair pedo i berain
• Gano ben 'Orchal i orchad' na hertha
• I orchad heren na randir sui sír
• Tungol Échap: awartha i thammas
help.shortcuts_content:
• Ctrl+Z: Avedui i orthor minui
• Ctrl+Y: Adrevedui i orthor awartha
• Ctrl+A: Egleri nel i telleir
• Ctrl+I: Thervia i orthel
• Ctrl+C: Honom i telleir thelegin
• Ctrl+X: Risto i telleir thelegin
• Ctrl+V: Pado i telleir
• Suppr: Deleb i telleir thelegin
• F5: Edro adannen i thîr en mossag
• F11: Tir pân-sgrîn (abed lín F11 or ESC)
help.dark_mode_content: Pitha i cannas anor/ithil ned thelia calen a morn thent.
help.sort_content:
Breitho i vuid 'Nestegi' na adnestegi thennas i telleir nu:
• Anu, Thîr, Cae, Fân, And, Taergalas pedo DPI
help.save_content:
• 'Garo': garo i gohelaith mi bâr edhellen
• 'Garo hen': caro târ nui
• 'Caro CBZ': erib mi bâd rendir erui (ú-târ)
help.other_content:
• Misto: misto er pedo rendir erui
• Edregol: edrego i rendir na thîr edhellen (PNG, JPEG, WEBP, BMP, TIFF, GIF). Pedo: i rendir CMYK autorui edregannar na RGB (PNG, JPEG, WEBP, BMP, TIFF, GIF). Pedo: i rendir CMYK autorui edregannar na RGB
• Teitho: teitho i telleir thelegin pedo nel i telleir
• Esgalad: esgelo telleir uirib
• Thaul Greinaid: panna i greinaid o bâr ComicInfo.xml (pe mi târ). Pe orthad pedo esgelo teleth o veleithron a breithar greinaid, i harfuil pannathad gohedo i rîm telleir berthanna. I greinaid edhel ú-gohedir. Si berth în aerlinn a sui thand o goheb.
help.config_files_content:
MosaicView harna .mosaicview_config.json parf. Parf hen harya wIvmey nórima i chu'moH tab nan po bertha, ar i ngo'Daq pantannen gonedir lista, mí ammar nórima i ngo'Daq pantannen beirain na tira. MosaicView harya beirain rast, mí i pathu randir orchadmeH orchan i nórima.
Beirain hin raim i {temp_dir} aldassë.
Beirain rast deletar caita mí i harfuil tora, nan .mosaicview_config.json parf, nathra, harnar na hartha.
Nan, beirain hin edhellen ú-cheria lín penia i {temp_dir} aldassë edro, mal i vuidain mi na ganad. .mosaicview_config.json parf recriar caita mí i harfuil penia, ar beirain rast recriar caita mí nórima.
help.config_config_cleared:
Bâr teHmeH mistranna.
Recriar caita i harfuil chu' penia.
help.language_content:
MosaicView erib mi lemmir erui.
Sui bâd, i harfuil hannatha thennas i lamm o lhaw i lhaw a panna mi lamm hen pe orthol. Pe i lhaw breithar lamm ú-orthol, i harfuil pannatha mi Annui.
Nenich gohedo lhaw i lamm sui lû nu breitho i menegol dannen sui bed o thírd o vuidain, nu bed i rhegol o veir nirn-randirain. I egleriad gwerent a heren na dreviad minui i harfuil.
LEMMIR ERIB: Annui, Arad, Arabad, Armeleg, Belgiaid, Bolgareg, Chinan (rimmen), Chinan (thannol), Coread, Croateg, Daneg, Eileg, Estoneg, Fenneg, Galleg, Giriegol, Gwindig, Hindi, Hungareg, Indonesiad, Islandeg, Italiad, Iapaneg, Lettoneg, Lituaneg, Maleg, Malteg, Nederlandeg, Norvegeg, Poloneg, Portegol, Romeg, Slovaceg, Sloveneg, Suideg, Tamil, Tchegol, Thai, Tyrceg, Ucraniad, Vietnamiad.
LEMMIR ANNEDOL ERIB: klingon (rimm ghItlh latin a ghItlh pIqaD), sindarin (rimm ghItlh latin a ghItlh tengwar), quenya (rimm ghItlh latin a ghItlh tengwar).

Si revthin an úgartha tinconi Windows, ach pIqaD (lamm Klingon) ar tengwar (lemmir Edhellen: Sindarin ar Quenya) tinconi. Tinconi hen nar úgartha chutmey ar tulir o arnedir hen:
- pIqaD an (parf Klingon lamm): {url_piqad}
- tengwar an (parf Edhel, Sindarin ar Quenya an): {url_tengwar}
Pe arnedir hen ú-gwerir tanna, cenich tirtha tinconi pIqaD ar tengwar nu ganad i vuidain sui ned:

Hen celwir caren mi Galleg. I edregolaith na lemmir edhel gwerin nu chorn IA, a ú-orthweg nu Claude. Nerthanen sui ebed na orthad hael o lemmir. Min ú-glinnol, ú-orthannen ach IA na breitho, achir garo a galu pae cant edregolir ú mi rimmas berthanna. Nu rimm thennas i edregolaith, eneth meria vin aegair. Anno daer, awarth nin.
help.credits_content: Ú-iston eneth o ortho parmagolath. Ú-eneth. Nu rimm hen, nerthanen hen celwir nu chorn Claude, i IA o Anthropic, a ú-orthweg nu Claude Code. Ú-cherithon anno annog im breitho Claude Code, hen harfuil în maer hael!
help.resize_pages_content:
Parth reduction or enlargement:
• Mîn or mî parth ethro
• Haer-pitha → 'resize'
• Neled options erib:
  - custom dimensionir: desired width or height bado (aspect ratio automatically preserved).
  - percentage reduction: 10% hen 90% percentage ethro
  - percentage enlargement: 10% hen 100% percentage ethro
• Application bereth estimated sad modification qaSpu cala
• Modification egor parth hain applies
help.icons_content:
I·velyn glamhoth nestannin i·thiw sennui sennui sennui gwador sí a lhûg na·bain i·thiw vail: https://www.freepik.com/author/juicy-fish/icons/juicy-fish-sketchy_908#from_element=resource_detail
Nef e-goeir annin apharthant.
Min tînco er, an tînco Windows danwen, awarnen nin (ah le AI, an na im bastog, bastog, bastog theledhir). Cenich nin chut na úgartha si tînco ve merich cín chanvo' cenich adnorthad or cín iaur.
help.split_ui_content:
MosaicView a allow gwelet dou archiv yn preder, tu ha tu.

Klikañ war an ikon Parzañ evit digeriñ eil panel. Pep panel a zo diDependencies: gallout a rit digeriñ, kemmañ ha salvañ un archiv diwar-bouez. Al panel oberiant a zo diskouezet gant ur vord glas.

Evit tremen pajennoù eus ur panel d'egile, lusket anezho ent eeun. Ma'z eo choazet meur a bajenn, mont a reont an holl a-gevret. Ar pajennoù a vez lakaet en tu ma tisklêrij ar barre ruz.

Klikañ war an ikon Serriñ eil panel evit distreiñ d'ar mod panel unan.
help.config_clipboard_note: Awarth: I gîl hannathel prestannen be Windows (gîl clipboard_XXXXX) caedant 12 lû ab i lost, an le în pastiel i theled ab i thaur. Ab 12 lû, reviar awarth.
help.config_log_note: I prestannath eryd (PDF na CBZ a CBR na CBZ) crear gîl gladhad an i raeg telin. I gîl sen (Log_pdftocbz_.txt a Log_cbrtocbz_.txt) garant ir ab abad i theled, an telin ceniel ad. Reviar pan be i thalion "Dago i gîl hannathel" or bo.
help.adjust_images_content: Mae'r nodwedd hon yn gadael ichi aildrethu eich lluniau'n uniongyrchol yn MosaicView. Gallwch addasu disgleirdeb, cyferbyniad, miniogder, lefelau, dwyster, cymhwyso effeithiau (du a gwyn, sepia, gwrthdroi lliwiau), addasu ansawdd cywasgu, dileu lliwiau, cymhwyso gweledigrwydd neu drosi i ddyfnderau lliw gwahanol. Mae gan rai gosodiadau wyliedydd pwrpasol sy'n gadael ichi weld y canlyniad ar ddatrysiad llawn cyn cymhwyso. Mae rhagolwg mân-lun yn dangos y canlyniad mewn amser real yn y ffenestr brif.
help.create_icon_content:
MosaicView leithia le caro i veth tîw (.ico) o any picture in i veth mosaig.
• Nauth mîn i picture → 'Caro i veth tîw'
• Tangado i mîn i cenirth (i veth tîw nauva côr)
• Cenno i nixë mauya
• Varyë: i .ico veth addë coimas mossë
• I .ico vethi automarë sarnë ilyë commë vanwi (16×16 ter 256×256)
• Tennoio i .ico veth ná mosaigossë, i tancë CBZ tancalanna ná harna, an i ICO commë ú-sarnë tancalnar. Ela i .ico veth enquerissë (Ctrl+C ar pasta Windowsë), sí antar co ohtë mosaigossë anta varyiëllo.
help.batch_convert_content:
MosaicView pân cîn gwaith hothail, nef i waith annog i thûl. Boe pediad: gwaith estolad, echui, gwestiad dan amser gîn, gwaith pelldad. Pân cîn i nef gwaith hothail.
• CBR → CBZ: gwaith CBR (RAR) estolad ar i gwaith. Ce CBR ná ZIP, 7z ho TAR, gwaith essë (.cbz, .cb7 ho .cbt) úmë. I gwaith essenótë ar i raxë nurner.
• CB7 → CBZ: gwaith CB7 (7-Zip) estolad ar i gwaith. Ce CB7 ná ZIP, RAR ho TAR, gwaith essë (.cbz, .cbr ho .cbt) úmë. I gwaith essenótë ar i raxë nurner.
• CBT → CBZ: gwaith CBT (TAR) estolad ar i gwaith. Ce CBT ná ZIP, RAR ho 7z, gwaith essë (.cbz, .cbr ho .cb7) úmë. I gwaith essenótë ar i raxë nurner.
• PDF → CBZ: gwaith PDF estolad ar i gwaith. I calmar nurner úmë.
• CALMAR → CBZ: gwaith CBZ ilya calma estolad ar i gwaith. I calmar úmë, i raxë, i parmë (TIFF) ho i lúmë (GIF) nurner.
help.icon_toolbar_content: I lŷr ervyr a rydd mynediad cyflym i brif swyddogaethau'r rhaglen. Gallwch aildrefnu'r eiconau yn ôl eich dymuniad drwy eu llusgo'n uniongyrchol i'r lŷr. I ddewis pa eiconau i'w dangos neu eu cuddio, cliciwch ar y botwm olwyn ddanheddog ar waelod y lŷr: agorir ffenestr ffurfweddu lle gallwch symud eiconau rhwng y lŷr weithredol a'r cronfa. Defnyddiwch y botymau « + » a « − » i addasu maint yr eiconau. Cedwir y ffurfweddiad yn awtomatig.

web.web_copy_paste_message:
Síta ar tulya sílima termarillo úpa.

Ar epë (pityalë):

1. Forya-mapta parmë termarissë
2. Quet 'Tehtë parmë'
3. MosaicView-ssë, car 'Tulya' wamba mal Ctrl+V

Sin lúmë hya ilya terma-parmain!
web.import_web_tooltip: Pasta ambartanen tëa mai antië ilya cormar parmanallo
web.import_web_invalid_url: Ú-anwa tëa. Queta tëa anwa mára.

donation.title: Anno
donation.message:
Le meleg n'hen hwest vuin a i cheriathog lû. Im tollen nephed lû cent i vuin. Ab annathog nin thand anno? Bess, im caun cuin anno ned linnathon i rim-nin edhel champagne.

Ab ennog ned lothron cuin pent lû ned cent lû o million lû euro, im tolog pent n'hen 'uil. I anno hen ab linnathog thand paypal

mail.tooltip: Si nestadren ortheri aes aethedrannol edhellen i Windows na thíra lethes. Avo or ortheri aethedran (estathar, avo vi ortheri gwevennol nan), gi estor aes adres MosaicView i limgor mín an gwedh aes ir ithron o thírin an gwesto.

updates.update_available:
Gwanath newydd: {latest}
Anog i {current} iest in.
updates.error:
Ú-govaded pân i gwanath.
Pen i raew.
